data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Provider performance comparison', but the evidence provided does not include any comparative metrics or performance data for the providers. While there is some data on individual provider performance (e.g., Dr. Smith has a 95% completion rate and Dr. Lee has 82%), there is no analysis or comparison that fulfills the requirement of comparing their performances against each other or against a standard. This lack of comparative evidence constitutes a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No comparative analysis of provider performance metrics.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
